description: Workflow hooks for Codex. SessionStart records unified session-scoped workflow state, tracks spawned subagent identities via transcript metadata, and injects provider-backed workflow authoring policy only for main sessions when .spec-track/config.yml exists in the active project. UserPromptSubmit reads mentioned GitHub issue references through cache-aware provider reads and injects project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext.

hooks.description: Inject workflow authoring resolver policy for configured workflow projects in main sessions
Cache mentioned GitHub issue references and inject project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext
